title: Cobblemon x Oritech Compat
description: This mod / datapack adds some compatability and new crafting recipes to Cobblemon using Oritech machines
body:
This mod adds over ✨**50 new recipes**✨ to Cobblemon items using Oritech Machines including (but not limited to);

- All Special Pokeballs
- Rare Candies
- XP Candies
- Red and Blue orb
- Prison Bottle
- Legend Plate
- All Potions
- Vitamins
- Some minor QOL recipes
- **...and Much More!**

This mod requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown), and [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech)

I also **highly** recommend [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) or some other mod to view recipes (REI, JEI) to make crafting easier

If you have any feedback or suggestions leave it in the Cobblemon [Discord](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1501709722275807366) Forums
